name: Sophia 4-Piece Feather Modular Sofa - Cream / Loveseat Pit
description: 5-PIECE CORNER MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30% larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension: 34''W x 20.5''D x 20''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 107'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam, which is CertiPur-US certified, and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feather. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness: medium plush. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The luxurious look fabric that creates a casual vibe in your room and gives you everyday comfort.. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. 100% FSC CERTIFIED WOOD FRAME- Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat: 350 lbs. FEATHER FILLED REVERSIBLE CUSHIONS - Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover (Cleaning Code: S). Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note: Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FIVE PACKAGES - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive on different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width: 20''Box 1: ArmsBox 2: Left seat & backrest Box 3: Right seat & backrestBox 4: Armless chair Box 5: Ottoman SPACIOUS & VERSATILE STORAGE OTTOMAN - Lift up the ottoman top with a built-in smooth gas-lift mechanism to reveal plenty of out-of-sight storage. Storage space: 28.5''W x 2756''D x 8.5''H. In addition, it is a perfect footrest or table when topped with a tray.

name: Liam 6-Piece Overstuffed Feather Wood Base Sectional Sofa - Milo Linen / Pit
description: 6-Piece Oversized Modular Sofa with Chaise - CHITA oversized modular sectional offers maximum comfort with its modular pieces that make dreams come true. These pieces feature extra deep seats, are easy to move around, and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Individual seat dimension: 35''W x 23.6''D x 19.7''H. Only four seats are needed to achieve a 153'' overall width. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness: medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat: 350 lbs. Seats That Do Not Slide Apart - Strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from the bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover (Cleaning Code: S). Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note: Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. Seven Packages - The U-shaped modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width: 16''Box 1: ArmsBox 2: Left Chair Seat & Backrest Box 3: Right Chair Seat & BackrestBox 4: Armless chair Box 5: Armless chairBox 6: Ottoman Box 7: Ottoman

name: Brendon Modular Ottoman with Wood Leg - Top Grain Leather / Saddle
description: Elegant Solid Wood Legs – Durability Meets Sophisticated Style：Crafted from premium solid wood, these sturdy legs provide exceptional strength and long-lasting support. Plus, the raised high-leg design allows easy access for robot vacuums, helping you keep your home effortlessly clean and tidy.Super Cozy Seating: Experience ultimate relaxation with the down-filled sofa. Whether solo or with family, every moment on this sofa is pure relaxation."Removable Cushions with Stylish Piping: This sofa features plump, removable seat, back cushions and arm pillows, all with zip-off covers for easy removal. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness: medium. Ideal for use in both home and office settings, they ensure you can relax or work comfortably for extended periods.Premium Quality Standard: The frame, made from FSC certified engineered pine and plywood, features a sturdy corner-blocked wooden construction. name: Oliver Power Recliner Sofa Chair - Creamy Gray
description: Modern & Stylish: This recliner sofa is designed with a low-slung, boxy silhouette that offers maximum comfort while instantly infusing any space with a sleek, modern vibe. It boasts extra-large seat depth and width, paired with easy-to-move modular components that can be configured flexibly—this not only makes it perfect for snuggling up with loved ones for reading, movie-watching, or casual relaxation, but also ensures it fits seamlessly in both small and spacious living rooms. Complementing its modern look, the recliner sofa’s back and seat cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers, which balances supportive structure with enhanced comfort and creates an enveloping feel to help you unwind completely.Dual Motors, Customize Your Comfort: Our premium power recliner sofa features a dual-motor system paired with a spacious seat width and generous seat depth, delivering exceptional comfort and personalized support in its fixed upright position. The backrest maintains a perfectly straight angle—ideal for reading or relaxed sitting, with ample room to stretch freely. You can also lift the fully padded footrest without tilting the backrest to reduce leg pressure, while the deep seat ensures lasting coziness during TV viewing. The adjustable headrest provides tailored support for your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch television in comfort, with the wide seat accommodating various sitting postures.Zero Wall Recliner sofa: Better than a wall hugger and ideal for spaces with limited square footage (e.g., RVs), this recliner can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the available space. When you ease into the reclining position, the backrest doesn’t move, and there’s no gap between the backrest and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against the wall or whatever is placed behind it.Backrest with feather Blend Filling, Cloud-Like Comfort: This recliner sofa boosts comfort with a backrest that includes premium feather, paired with supportive materials to blend plush softness and reliable support. The feather delivers a light, fluffy touch that gently conforms to your back’s curves, wrapping you in a cozy layer that eases tension during sitting. The accompanying supportive materials help the backrest maintain its shape, ensuring stable support even with long-term use—so you get the coziness of feather without compromising on lasting comfort. Convenient Design: Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. And for added ease, the recliner ships in a single box, with only the metal legs needing self-assembly by the user.Sturdy Construction & Certified Materials: Each piece is handcrafted by master artisans using a corner-blocked wooden frame. The back cushions are filled with bagged and channeled polyester fiber to retain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures lasting support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism combined with a UL-certified actuator delivers not only comfort and stability but also quiet, smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs.Overall Dimension: 43.3''D x 45.5''W x 38.2''H. Seat Dimension: 23.6'D x29.5''W x 19.3''H. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height: 5'1"-5.9'. Seat firmness: medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3.Simple Assembly: Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.Warranty: You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.

Designed with a spacious high backrest, generously deep and wide seat, and exceptionally plush cushions, this sofa offers an incredibly cozy seating experience—ideal for relaxing, reading, or enjoying movie nights with loved ones.Adaptable Modular Design: Customize your layout with ease. Perfect for modern living.Extra Bonus: Enhance your comfort with the added bonus of supportive lumbar pillows. Ideal for use in both home and office settings, they ensure you can relax or work comfortably for extended periods.Premium Quality Standard: The frame, made from FSC certified engineered pine and plywood, features a sturdy corner-blocked wooden construction. name: Liam 4-Piece Overstuffed Feather Wood Base Sectional Sofa - With Ottomans / Camel
description: 4-Piece Oversized Modular Sofa with Chaise - CHITA oversized modular couch offers maximum comfort with its modular pieces that make dreams come true. These pieces feature extra deep seats, are easy to move around, and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Individual seat dimension: 35''W x 23.6''D x 19.7''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 118'' overall width. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness: medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat: 350 lbs. Seats That Do Not Slide Apart - Strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from the bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover (Cleaning Code: S). Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note: Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. Five Packages - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width: 16''Box 1: ArmsBox 2: Left Chair Seat & Backrest Box 3: Right Chair Seat & BackrestBox 4: Armless chair Box 5: Ottoman

name: Addy Genuine Leather Lift Assist Power Recliner With Heat Massage - Saddle
description: Effortless Dual Motor Lift Chair: Discover unparalleled comfort with the CHITA Power Lift Recliner Chair for elderly. name: Keith Leather Swivel Glider Recliner with Power Headrest - Top Grain Leather / Dark Brown
description: Modern & Stylish: This recliner combines a modern aesthetic with fluid contours, delivering a luxurious look and feel. The double-layered armrests feature smooth, minimalist lines that curve gently outward, offering refined style and enhanced comfort. The seat cushion is accentuated with elegant tufted detailing, creating a plush, cloud-like comfort. Accented with fashionable single-stitch tailoring, it exudes contemporary elegance. Its sleek, sophisticated design integrates seamlessly into modern living spaces, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate elevated home aesthetics.Ultimate Comfort Customization: Experience unparalleled relaxation with our dual-motor power recliner, featuring a 270-degree swivel and smooth gliding motion. The adjustable power headrest and contoured backrest provide customized support for your neck and upper body. Plushly padded armrests offer added comfort, making it ideal for unwinding after a long day. In the upright position, the backrest remains straight, perfect for reading or working. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. When fully reclined, the chair extends to a 135-degree angle, offering a restful position for naps.Power Headrest: Our power recliner is equipped with a power headrest feature that can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, allowing you to find the most comfortable position. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. When watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience.Premium Top-Grain Leather: Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather.Sturdy Construction & Certified Materials: Sturdy Construction & Certified Materials: Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, arms rests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs.Convenient Charging: Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords.Overall Dimension: 34.3''D x 38.6''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension: 21.3''D x 22.8''W x 20.5''H. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height: 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness: medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3.Simple Assembly: Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 30.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.Warranty: You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.

name: Kenna Ottoman / Armless Chair - Armless Chair / Green-Performance Fabric
description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep & wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Ottoman Overall Size: 44.9"W x 40.9"D x 20.9''H Ottoman Box Size: 46.1''W x 42.1''D x 21.7''H Armless Chair Overall Size: 40.94"W x 41.73"D x 27.56''H Armless Chair Box Size: 42.5'' x 42.5'' x 29.1''

name: Theo Power Swivel Glider Recliner - Cream - Faux Leather / Upgraded Adjustable
description: Comfort: The power recliner chair is designed with Mom's comfort in mind, featuring a 270-degree swivel, glide, and quiet, smooth recline function that can be operated with the push of a button. It features a patented Leggett & Platt mechanism, which has passed a rigorous 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, ensuring long-lasting durability and stability. Sturdy Construction & Certified Materials: Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using a corner-blocked wooden frame. The back cushions feature bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain their shape. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. Relaxation & Convenient Charging: The Power Glider Swivel Rocker Recliner Chair includes an extended footrest for complete relaxation, making it perfect for activities such as watching television, sleeping, and reading. Built-in USB charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Overall Dimension: 39''D x 33.3''W x 39.6''H. Seat Dimension: 21.3'D x 22.4''W x 19.3''H. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height: 5'1"-5'10". Simple Assembly: Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 28'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty: You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. name: Isaac Genuine Leather Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Navy / Extra-large
description: Dual Motors: Offering a full spectrum of five-star amenities, our Isaac power recliner is your gateway to relaxation perfection. Not only does it feature power motion and a power headrest that adjust to your liking, but it also provides unparalleled comfort and support. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward while maintaining no gap between the back and seat. Genuine Leather: Premium top grain leather is upholstered everywhere you touch. The top-grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. Power Headrest for Customized Positioning And Comfort: As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. Convenient Charging: Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. name: Jaxon Genuine Leather Swivel Glider Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Genuine Leather-Top Grain Leather / Cognac
description: Modern & Stylish: This recliner embodies modern design with its exquisite overall shape. The soft, beautifully curved cushions on the armrests showcase attention to detail and craftsmanship while providing excellent arm support. Its sophisticated aesthetic seamlessly blends into any modern living space, making it a must-have for fashion-forward individuals. Ultimate Comfort Customization: Experience unparalleled relaxation with our dual-motor power recliner, featuring a 270-degree swivel and glider function. The power headrest and ergonomic double-layer backrest provide tailored support for your neck and lumbar. The soft padding on the armrests offers additional comfort for your arms, making it perfect for unwinding after a long day. When the chair is in the upright position, the backrest remains straight, ideal for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. In the fully reclined position, the recliner opens up to a maximum angle of 135 degrees, perfect for naps. Power Headrest: Our power recliner is equipped with a power headrest feature that can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, allowing you to find the most comfortable position. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. When watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Convenient Design: Effortlessly stay connected with built-in USB and Type-C charging ports integrated into the recliner’s activator button. Designed for modern living, this feature ensures your devices are always charged, enhancing your daily lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. Premium Top-Grain Leather: Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather.

description: Premium Triple-Motor Nursery Glider: Far more than your typical nursery chair, this swivel glider recliner is designed with mom's comfort in mind. It features a triple-motor control system, 270-degree swivel and glide capabilities, a powered headrest, and powered lumbar support, providing unmatched comfort and support in all positions. Comfortable in All Positions: The armrests of this nursery glider chair feature an outward-turned design, making them ideal for holding a baby to sleep or providing arm support while lying down to breastfeed. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. When fully reclined, the chair reaches a 135° opening angle, perfect for napping. As you lounge, you can independently adjust the electric headrest and lumbar support to cradle your head, neck, and waist. This ensures optimal support during naps or short breaks, helping you achieve a more restorative rest. Power Headrest & Power Lumbar Support: Our electric recliner chair is equipped with power headrest and power lumbar Support, These features can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, helping you and your baby find the most comfortable position. The power lumbar support effectively reduces pressure on the spine and muscles, relieving discomfort from prolonged sitting. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. Moreover, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Convenient Design: The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. name: Errol Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner - Khaki
description: Premium Nursery Glider: Elevate your nursery experience with the CHITA Nursery Glider Recliner. name: Neta Modern Boucle Upholstered Platform Bed, Full & Queen Sizes - Queen
description: Modern design - a wide headboard and a clean frame, supported by rounded pillar legs. These cylindrical posts add a smooth geometric beauty to the entire bed. Easy to clean—this bed features BOUCLE-style jacquard fabric that is soft and comfortable. It has a waterproof function, so you don’t have to worry about water stains on the light-colored fabric. The bed frame boasts a sturdy wooden construction, It features seven solid rubberwood leg contact points with the floor, ensuring optimal stability. The full-size frame can support a maximum weight of 700 lbs, whereas the queen-size frame is capable of bearing up to 800 lbs. This bed frame is suitable for 8-10 inch mattresses. The queen bed has 14 slats spaced 2.9 inches apart, making it compatible with any type of mattress, whether it’s a spring mattress, memory foam mattress, latex mattress, or hybrid mattress. Adding EVA foam sound insulation in the middle rail. This provides a better sleep experience Easy to assemble, The instructions are simple to follow . It can be put together in just 60 minutes, and we suggest having two people to expedite the process. Two-Box Shipment. Facilitating the convenient transport of larger items into your home, though the boxes may not arrive simultaneously. Fabric is certified by OEKO-TEX, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of this fabric has been tested for harmful substances and that the fabric therefore is harmless for human health Simple assembly is required. The queen size bed comes in two separate boxes. one box is 66.5" L x 40.1" W x 3.9" H，the other is 83.5" L x 20.5" W x 10.2" H.Should you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our professional customer support team. We are dedicated to providing you with a satisfactory solution.

description: Design & Stylish: This electric swivel recliner features a stylish design, with simple and smooth lines creating a modern aesthetic. The pockets can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, or other small items, while the dual cup holders are perfect for holding drinks and snacks while you watch a movie or play games. Additionally, built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. name: Skyline Power Console - Cream
description: Skyline Motion sofa: Modern Aesthetic, Upgraded Comfort, for a Zero-Gravity Home Experience. Skyline lives up to its name by providing a versatile array of design choices, from linear to corner configurations, adaptable to any living space and personal style. This sofa ingeniously fuses comfort with contemporary elegance, making it an unparalleled choice for living rooms of all dimensions. Skyline adopts a high back design, which is full and round, fitting the human body curve. It is padded with a soft blend of fiber, providing you with comprehensive support from neck to waist. The specially designed fixed lumbar pillow effectively supports the waist, relieves fatigue from long periods of sitting, and allows you to relax your body and mind. The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions. It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud. Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it. Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways. This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down. Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience. An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity. Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3. Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability. Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and suitable for high-traffic use (tested up to 100,000 rubs), containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console: Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more—infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment. Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned. Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing. The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend. Caution Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Box dimension Power Left Chair: 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Power Right Chair: 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Armless Chair: 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Power Armless Chair: 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Wedge: 62.6'' x 41.7'' x 31.5'' Console: 38.2'' x 14.2'' x 34.3''

The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions. It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud. Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it. Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways. This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down. Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience. An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity. Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3. Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability. Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and suitable for high-traffic use (tested up to 100,000 rubs), containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console: Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more—infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment. Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned. Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing. The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend. Caution Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Box dimension Power Left Chair: 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Power Right Chair: 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Armless Chair: 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Power Armless Chair: 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Wedge: 62.6'' x 41.7'' x 31.5'' Console: 38.2'' x 14.2'' x 34.3''

name: Oliver 3-Seat Wall-hugger Reclining Sectional Sofa with Power Headrest - 3 / 2 / Creamy Gray
description: Oliver is designed with a low-slung, boxy silhouette that offers maximum comfort, making any space look instantly sleek and modern. Oliver boasts extra-large seat depth and width, perfect for snuggling up with loved ones to read, watch a movie, or just relax. It can bring you the ultimate comfort. In addition, Oliver has modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in different ways. It is suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. Oliver's back and seat cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers, ensuring both support and enhanced comfort. The combination of these filling materials creates an enveloping feeling that allows you to completely relax. Oliver is equipped with an adjustable headrest, allowing you to meet different needs for better support of the back and neck. When you are reading or watching a movie, you can also lift the footrest without tilting the backrest to achieve the most comfortable TV viewing position. In the fully reclined position, it lays flat for naps. Oliver is specially designed as a zero-wall recliner to take up less space than traditional items. Better than a wall hugger, it can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the available space. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against the wall or anything placed behind it. Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Oliver collection includes metal connectors for keeping components securely interlocked. It is not modular and is not designed to stand alone. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2.

name: Oliver Power Console - Creamy Gray
description: Oliver is designed with a low-slung, boxy silhouette that offers maximum comfort, making any space look instantly sleek and modern. Oliver boasts extra-large seat depth and width, perfect for snuggling up with loved ones to read, watch a movie, or just relax. It can bring you the ultimate comfort. In addition, Oliver has modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in different ways. It is suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. Oliver's back and seat cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers, ensuring both support and enhanced comfort. The combination of these filling materials creates an enveloping feeling that allows you to completely relax. Oliver is equipped with an adjustable headrest, allowing you to meet different needs for better support of the back and neck. When you are reading or watching a movie, you can also lift the footrest without tilting the backrest to achieve the most comfortable TV viewing position. In the fully reclined position, it lays flat for naps. Oliver is specially designed as a zero-wall recliner to take up less space than traditional items. Better than a wall hugger, it can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the available space. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against the wall or anything placed behind it. Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Oliver collection includes metal connectors for keeping components securely interlocked. It is not modular and is not designed to stand alone. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2.

Not An Average Nursery Chair: Although not quite visible, the patented Leggett & Platt mechanism really stands out. The mechanism passes 25,000-cycle life test and has a weight limit of 350 lbs. Powered mechanism also allows you to get up from the chair without waking up the baby in your arms. Not An Eye Sore: Mom deserves beautiful things. Tired of husband’s boxy or chunky recliners? We heard you. Be prepared to receive compliments on this elegant low profile design with curved silhouette. Bonus Features: Built-in USB charging ports for easy charging of your mobile devices. Fixed lumbar cushion offers extra support and keeps your room clean and tidy. Safe & Sound: Foam is environmentally friendly and certified by CertiPUR-US, meaning it is made without PBDEs or Tris flame retardants, heavy metals, formaldehyde, etc. Engineered wood is EPA TSCA Title VI compliant. Actuator, adaptor and handset are certified by UL. Simple Assembly & Warranty: Just slide the back into the seat and – Shoop! – you’re all set. You are also buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and solid wood frame

name: Ohana Modular Armless Chair - Standard Armless Module / Fossil Gray
description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions: In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2. Free White Glove Service: Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.

REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness: medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat: 350 lbs. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover (Cleaning Code: S). Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note: Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. SIX PACKAGES - The 5-piece corner modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions: In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2. Free White Glove Service: Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.

name: Isaac Genuine Leather Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Brown / Standard
description: Dual Motors: Offering a full spectrum of five-star amenities, our Isaac power recliner is your gateway to relaxation perfection. Not only does it feature power motion and a power headrest that adjust to your liking, but it also provides unparalleled comfort and support. Wall Hugger Recliner: Wall hugger recliners are great space-savers, making them perfect if you don't have a lot of room but still want the ability to recline (e.g., in the RV). When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward while maintaining no gap between the back and seat. Genuine Leather: Premium top grain leather is upholstered everywhere you touch. The top-grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. Power Headrest for Customized Positioning And Comfort: As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Sturdy Construction & Certified Materials: Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs. Convenient Charging: Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Easy To Clean: Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Simple Assembly: Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Overall Dimension of Medium Size: 38.2''D x 37''W x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension: 21.3''D x 22.8''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity: 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height: 5'2"-6'1". Overall Dimension of Extra-Large Size: 40.2''D x 40.7''W x 44.1''H. Seat Dimension: 21.3''D x 25.2''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity: 450 lbs. Recommended Seater Height: 5'4"-6'4". Warranty: You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.

name: Tracee Modern Power Swivel Glider Recliner - Fabric / Milo Linen
description: Power Swivel Glider: Designed with Mom’s comfort in mind, it swivels (270 degrees), glides, and reclines quietly and smoothly with a push of button. name: Ohana 5-Seat Zero Gravity Modular Reclining Sofa - 2 / 0 / Milo Linen
description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions: In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB & Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness: Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 (5 being firmest), it's a 2. Free White Glove Service: Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.
